---
title: "STATS345 Final Project - Songs"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-15"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(rvest)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)

years <- c(1959:2025)
wiki_url <- str_c("https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Billboard_Year-End_Hot_100_singles_of_", years)
all_songs <- vector("list", 67)

for (i in 1:length(wiki_url)) {
  all_songs[[i]] <- tibble(
    
  )
}

wiki_url <- "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Billboard_Year-End_Hot_100_singles_of_1959"
html <- read_html(wiki_url)
songs <- html_nodes(html, "table")
songs[[1]] |> html_table()

wiki_url2 <- "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Billboard_Year-End_Hot_100_singles_of_1960"
html2 <- read_html(wiki_url2)
songs2 <- html_nodes(html2, "table")
songs2[[1]] |> html_table()

```

```{r}
library(rvest)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)

years <- c(1959:2025)

scrape_billboard <- function(year) {
  url <- str_c("https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Billboard_Year-End_Hot_100_singles_of_", year)
  Sys.sleep(1)
  
  # Try-catch to handle missing or changed pages
  tryCatch({
    page <- read_html(url)
    
    # Extract the first table (Wikipedia pages may have multiple tables)
    table <- page %>%
      html_element("table.wikitable") %>%
      html_table()
    
    # Standardize column names (Wikipedia changes them sometimes)
    colnames(table) <- tolower(colnames(table))
    
    # Select only the relevant columns (case-insensitive match)
    table <- table %>%
      select(
        no = matches("^no|№"),
        title = matches("title"),
        artist = matches("artist")
      ) %>%
      mutate(year = year,
             songlyrics_url = str_c("https://www.songlyrics.com/", 
                            str_replace_all(str_replace_all(str_to_lower(artist), "[^a-z0-9]", ""), " ", "-"), "/",
                            str_replace_all(str_replace_all(str_to_lower(title), "[^a-z0-9]", ""), " ", "-"), "-lyrics/"
             ))  # Add year column
    
    
    return(as_tibble(table))
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("Skipping year ", year, " due to error: ", e$message)
    return(NULL)  # Return NULL if scraping fails
  })
}

# Scrape all years and combine efficiently
billboard_data <- map(years, scrape_billboard) %>%
 compact() %>%        # Remove NULLs from failed years
  bind_rows()          # Combine all at once

```
